author: anon-295fd0bb
content: Decision: Implement as commands/prune.rs with a standalone git_in_dir() helper. Will use SyncManager::init_cache() and KnowledgeManager::init_cache() to ensure caches exist, then operate directly on the worktrees via git commands. Squash approach: git checkout --orphan, add all, commit, then update-ref the branch. Need to add remote() getter to KnowledgeManager.
